title: LANMU Wine Bottle Torch Wicks, Outdoor Patio Backyard Torches Lights, Oil Lamps Glass Replacement Wick Hardware Kit, DIY Homemade Torch Decor (3 Pack)
features: Wicks for oil lamps: use LANMU wicks to make your own beautiful wine bottle lamps, garden torches. Ideal decoration oil lamp or torches for patio, fence, table and outdoors.

Nice alternative for solar lantern: let the empty wine bottles become the alternative decoration of solar light for your garden or balcony and beautify your house. And highquality material makes the wick for oil lamps more environmentally friendly and ensures a smokefree and pleasant atmosphere.

High quality set with lid: made of durable fiberglass material, after a simple installation in 3 steps you will get the amazing effect. With sealing rings on the bracket and chain on the lid as an aid.
Perfect Compatibility: Wicks fit all standard bottles, such as whiskey bottle, bourbon bottle, wine bottle, etc. And fiberglass wick is suitable for most torch lamp oil.
Package Content:3 wicks, 3 brass mounts and 3 covers.
